title: Zoospore Isolation of Aurantiochytrium limacinum
author: Mariana Rius
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.u73ezqn

steps.title: Inoculate 500 ul GPY media (microcentrifuge...
steps.instruction: Inoculate 500 ul GPY media (microcentrifuge tube) with toothpick scrape of a colony. If inoculating a zeocin resistant colony, add 5 ul zeocin (for 100 ug/ml). Vortex/ resuspend cells. Pipette 4.5 ml of GPY into a 15 ml glass culture tube. Add 500 ul inoculum. Incubate at 28 C, 170 rpm for 48 h, or until microscopy reveals the presence of zoospores.

steps.title: Filter culture using a 5 um...
steps.instruction: Filter culture using a 5 um nylon filter membrane, nalgene filter holder, and filtration pump.Transfer flowthrough to a microcentrifuge tube and centrifuge 5 min 11000 rpm.

steps.title: Resuspend cell pellet in 100 ul...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cell pellet in 100 ul of ½ Artificial Seawater (ASW) or media. Make a 10X dilution by adding 10 ul of cells to 90 ul of ½ ASW or media. Spread onto 2% agar GPY (+ zeocin +amp) plate. Incubate at 28 C for 48 - 72 h until colonies appear.
